text.message: you already have one of the two best starts
youre helping out your only real opponent with those blocks
is red my only real opponent?
says the guy with the city
and so is my resource mix
if we keep your ore and wheat unblocked you have 3 cities in no time
but not in the right balance
if i get a city we can talk
leave red the option to get road
its not like their setup lacked ore
in the long run i mean
just dont want to port all my cards
wont be the last time i stole from red
and im the one 7outing on my turn
i cant get amry or road
yeah man, youre on 8 with open settle
u all got me messed up
